real_interview.content: IntroV4Confirmation (hi i'm ellie thanks for coming in today i was created to talk to people in a safe and secure environment i'm not a therapist but i'm here to learn about people and would love to learn about you i'll ask a few questions to get us started and please feel free to tell me anything your answers are totally confidential are you ok with this)
how_doingV (so how are you doing today)
like_about_LA (what are some things you really like about l_a)
the food the weather and the people
dont_like_LA (what are some things you don't really like about l_a)
i don't know it's not too many things i really don't like about l_a maybe
some of the bad people or some of the bad environments in l_a
travel_shoes (i'm sure you can tell by my shoes i'm not much of a world explorer do you travel a lot)
um i only been like to texas las vegas and
memorableB (what's one of your most memorable experiences)
catching a airplane to houston texas like back and forth to visit my dad
going to las vegas a lot
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
when i was younger i used to go visit my dad and 'cause he used to live in houston texas and i used to catch the airplane a lot
and that was a lot of fun i wasn't scared that was a lot of fun
great_situation (that sounds like a great situation)
study (what did you study at school)
um when i went to school i studied child development and nursing
hard_decision (how did you decide to do that)
i know i wanted to be somebody and when i went to school i wasn't sure what i wanted to be
so i kinda took um nursing the l_v_n program first
and then i didn't wanna be a nurse so i changed my major to child development and i graduated from that
still_working_on_X (are you still working in that)
no i'm actually looking for work i'm unemployed right now
probably doing something working with the kids opening up a nursery or something my own business
in my mind it's simple but like in reality it seem like it's kinda difficult <laughter>
shyoutgoing (do you consider yourself more shy or outgoing)
sometimes i'm shy but i'm really an outgoing person and a people person
relax_fishtank (sometimes when i'm feeling tense i turn on the fish tank screensaver hey i know it's not hawaii but it's the best i've got what do you do to relax)
um to relax i listen to some slow music i kinda like um
and maybe lay down watch a little t_v or something
control_temper (how are you at controlling your temper)
i'm very good at controlling my temper
i don't like to get really angry or upset
last_argument (when was the last time you argued with someone and what was it about)
when i really have arguments they're like because people don't agree to disagree
and then it's over <o> like really petty it's like

we might say oh it's just like my opinion and they don't agree with my opinion so we argue about that but it's like nothing really big or anything like that it's just stupid i don't even remember <laughter>
feelguilty (what's something you feel guilty about)
probably not working right now i need a job <laughter>
good_job (it can be tough to find a good job these days)
situation_handled (tell me about a situation that you wish you had handled differently)
i don't really remember a situation i try to really think before i really handle a situation and i try to handle it in a my best positive way
before i really do something i regret
hard_decisionB (tell me about the hardest decision you've ever had to make)
um being with somebody like a guy you know if i wanna continue a relationship with them
family_relationship (tell me about your relationship with your family)
my relationship with my family i don't have
i just really stay with my dad and i have a daughter
and we just stay close all my family they're either in um
they're around but i don't really socialize with a lot of my family
influence_positive (who's someone that's been a positive influence in your life)
because um i live with him right now i've been staying with him maybe about five <f> five to six years
he's just the only one i really look up to i don't really have nobody else around me to really look up to and
she's in the fifth grade she's graduating she's going to the sixth grade and i'm kinda excited for that
easy_parent (do you find it easy to be a parent)
sometimes it's easy but uh sometimes it gets a little overwhelming
parent_hardest (what's the hardest thing about being a parent)
um the hardest thing about being a parent is being a single parent
parent_best (what's the best thing about being a parent)
it's just you always have somebody to bring you joy i enjoy always doing things with my daughter
um it's just about making a lot of sacrifices and just always
it's brings me so much joy being a parent
parent_differences (what are some ways that you're different as a parent than your parents)
um my parents when i was younger
i don't know i'm i'm a much better parent 'cause i'm more interested about what my child wants to do i'm involved in her life
i'm really fully involved my parents wasn't really that involved you know they had a drug problem
i had to mature a lot faster than a lot of other kids
memory_erase (tell me about an event or something that you wish you could erase from your memory)
their drug addiction i wish i could erase that from my memory
symptoms_cope (how do you cope with them)
um now i cope with them
well but um when i was growing up it just was rough it was very rough
had to do a lot of things on my own
um they wasn't involved in my decisions in life you know i just
i didn't know how to really grow up and be a kid and which way to go or anything it just was like i was in a world by myself
easy_sleep (how easy is it for you to get a good night's sleep)
oh it's very easy i sleep well every night i can sleep any time i sleep very well
feel_lately (how have you been feeling lately)
a little sad but most of the time i'm very happy i'm just not happy with where i am in my life right now
behavior_changes (have you noticed any changes in your behavior or thoughts lately)
not really i really i try to think very positive and try to do whatever i can every day to look for work and
ptsd_diagnosed (have you ever been diagnosed with p_t_s_d)
depression_diagnosed (have you been diagnosed with depression)
happy_lasttime (tell me about the last time you felt really happy)
um the last time i felt very happy was when i graduated from um college i felt very happy that was one of the best things that happened in my life and
that was the last time i was really really very happy like that
describe_felt (how did you feel in that moment)
i felt like i was on top of the world i felt like
everything was just so exciting for me that day i was just very very happy nothing could make me upset that day i was very happy and when i think about that day it just
it's a very happy experience for me
BF_describe (how would your best friend describe you)
right now i don't have <ha> really have a best friend
i tried to eliminate a lot of my friends because they wasn't really making a lot of positive choices so right now i'm just like
i really don't have any friends right now
Ellie17Dec2012_07 (what would you say are some of your best qualities)
a happy person i'm a outgoing person
self_change (what are some things you wish you could change about yourself)
um insecurities like um sometimes i feel like
um i have a lot of weight on my shoulders or something i feel like i can't get through something i can't
get to the next step sometimes or
feelbadly (tell me about a time when someone made you feel really badly about yourself)
well i did have a friend and she was like bipolar
and i tried to really be her friend no matter um the disease she had
she wasn't a really good friend because she
being very negative and just talking about me like we were enemies and everything and
it didn't really make me feel too bad about myself but it just made me pick my friends very wisely
yeah just being friends with certain people that don't have positive things going on with themselves or just
don't it just when i notice things about people that should determine whether i wanna be their friend or not you know they might have
bad qualities or just some bad habits they might smoke cigarettes or drink and i should notice that that's a red flag and i shouldn't be these
advice_back (what advice would you give to yourself ten or twenty years ago)
stay positive stay focused and surround myself with good positive people
Ellie17Dec2012_10 (tell me about something you did recently that you really enjoyed)
um to a friend's house that i haven't seen since childhood
it was just a lot of people over there
and they had a barbecue and everything and i really enjoyed seeing my old friends that i didn't see in a long time
certain friends i really enjoyed because i'm really always in the house i really don't go out that often
so just i enjoyed being with
a group of friends and family and having a good time
Ellie17Dec2012_08 (what are you most proud of in your life)
i did get my g_e_d i did graduate
and i do wanna be somebody and i'm very proud that i wanna be a better parent than my parents
asked_everything (okay i think i have asked everything i need to)
appreciate_open (thanks for sharing your thoughts with me)
